evals.prompt: After removing the Recent Jobs feature, verify in the browser that the Recent Jobs section no longer appears on the job search page.
evals.expected_output: Login to Grafana via agent-browser, open /a/yuuki-slurm-app/jobs, confirm 'Recent Jobs' text is absent from the page via grep, and take a screenshot for visual confirmation.

evals.prompt: Verify that selecting a job from the job list correctly navigates to the Job Dashboard page and displays it without errors.
evals.expected_output: Open the job search page, click a job table row, confirm the dashboard page loads with metadata cards and metric panels via snapshot/screenshot.

evals.prompt: Verify that the search filters on the job search page work correctly. Filter by username and confirm the job list updates.
evals.expected_output: Open the job search page, fill in the Username field, click Search, and confirm the table results are filtered accordingly via snapshot/text.
